title: Indonesia - Business Visa
visa_fee: 20,000 BDT per applicant (Legalization, Notary, Translation & Insurance extra)

details.title: Eligibility
items: Valid passport with at least 6 months validity from the date of travel.
Purpose of travel must be business related.
Proof of financial capability.
Invitation letter from Indonesian company or counterpart.
Confirmed travel arrangements (flight and hotel booking).
Health insurance coverage.

details.title: Required Documents
items: Valid passport with minimum 6 months validity from the date of travel.
2 copies of recent color photos (size 3x4 cm, matte paper, white background, cap and glasses not allowed).
Proof of funds of at least USD 2000 within the last 6 months (Bank Statement + Bank Solvency Certificate).
Original blank checkbook copy.
TIN certificate.
Return air ticket reservation.
Hotel reservation.
Proof of health insurance.
Invitation letter from an Indonesian counterpart or sponsoring company.
Sponsor details including name, address, phone number and Indonesian ID card (KTP) for individuals or company details for organizations.
Updated trade license (if in Bangla, English translation with notary copy must be attached).
Business pad (2 copies).
Memorandum of Articles copy if proprietor or managing director name is not mentioned in the trade license.
Visiting card.

note: All expenditures related to visa processing are strictly non-refundable. Visa information and associated charges are subject to change at any time without prior notice. We provide assistance only and do not guarantee the issuance of visas. This information sheet has been prepared by us and may include additional details beyond the embassy's requirements.
